ops.body: Lease reconciled 2026-07-17 (heartbeat was ~50h idle; work continued in-session). State: DPO-onto-athome committed (bb50359); steer/ditto WIP landed as 3 atomic commits (6f19c47/6d5edc0/11ead8c) + review-fix 67beca6 — suite 596 green. detach/launchd wiring turned out already implemented (cli.py:706-844); a fix lane is adding the missing detach/schedule CLI tests + RunSink crash-resume test, plus 4 robustness fixes (spawnllm in train extra, SpendExceeded→max-cost stop, run-id entropy, sys.executable child cmd). Criterion still open: the detached lab-run smoke + calibration byte-parity check remain to run at final verification — do not close until both pass.
